mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (member_id, title, content) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, member_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT notice_id, member_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at FROM notices ORDER BY created_at DESC, notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
